seoTitle: Kembla Heights vs Kemps Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kembla Heights and Kemps Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kembla Heights vs Kemps Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kembla Heights and Kemps Creek.
heading: Kembla Heights vs Kemps Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kembla Heights, New South Wales and Kemps Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kembla Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kemps Creek (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kembla Heights or Kemps Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kembla Heights has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Kemps Creek scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kembla Heights scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Kemps Creek scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kembla Heights or Kemps Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kembla Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
